herb_disease: Malignant neoplasm of colon and/or rectum
Secondary malignant neoplasm of lymph node
summary: To replenish the liver, to cause tranquilizations to arrest excessive perspiration, and to promote the production of body fluid.
Neurasthenia, vacuity vexation and insomnia, fright palpitation, arrhythmia, frequent dreaming, vacuity and profuse sweating, fluid damage and thirst.

The chief components are jujuboside A and B. 1. Intraperitoneal injection its decoction ( 2.5-5.0g/kg ) exerts sedative and hypnotic effects in rats. 2. Intravenous injection of its decoction exerts significant and proloned hypotensive effect in anestheti
